calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-110 x ARC-108 ascending-spiral gain validation (loop-effective-weight repair; A_ASCENDING_OFF vs A_ASCENDING_ON)
items.note: Validation falsifier for the ascending-spiral gain substrate (landed 2026-07-03, /implement-substrate). CLEARS A RE-DERIVE BRAKE: new EXQ number testing a NEWLY-BUILT mechanism (config.e3.use_ascending_spiral_gain) on a freshly-built substrate -- routed by the confirmed failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-709_2026-07-03 + failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-710_2026-07-03 (both name v4_loop_segregation loop-effective-weight ceiling as load-bearing). Swept factor = use_ascending_spiral_gain ONLY (learned cross-loop arbitration ON on both arms). Load-bearing precondition: on A_ASCENDING_ON the limbic loop reaches >= motor effective weight on >=3/4 divergent seeds; unmet -> substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory, NEVER a false weakens), same non-vacuity discipline as 709/710. Then C1: A_ASCENDING_ON committed-class entropy strict-above A_ASCENDING_OFF. PASS -> MECH-439 weakens / ARC-108 + ARC-110 supports; decisive FAIL (limbic wins but no conversion) -> MECH-439 supports / ARC-108 + ARC-110 weakens. Substrate unblocks_claims: MECH-439, ARC-108, ARC-110, MECH-450, MECH-140. PROMOTES NOTHING until this scores. Smoke --dry-run PASS (ascending gain live: ON-arm strict_exceed_ticks=36, m_range 8.38 vs 709 ~0.05).

items.title: Distributional E2 world-forward heads (T0-alpha-inspired diagnostic): MSE-point vs hetero-Gaussian vs quantile-pinball vs mixture-MDN
items.note: EXPLORATORY DIAGNOSTIC, PROMOTES NOTHING (claim_ids=[], experiment_purpose=diagnostic; excluded from governance confidence/conflict scoring). Priority 0 so it never preempts the conversion-ceiling work (711). Motivated by the T0-alpha probabilistic time-series model (user-shared): REE's E2 world-forward is a pure POINT predictor trained with MSE (e2_fast.py:176 / e2_world.py:277), and predictive uncertainty is only ever post-hoc (E3.current_precision = retrospective running-variance EMA, e3_selector.py:512; SplitEncoder precision_logit is a static encoder gate). This probe holds the encoder + transition set FIXED and swaps ONLY the forward head + loss, comparing four formulations on the SAME held-out (z_world_t, a_t)->z_world_{t+1} transitions: mse_point (MSE + fitted homoscedastic sigma = the state-blind EMA null), hetero_gaussian (mean+logvar, Gaussian NLL), quantile_pinball (9 quantiles, pinball; direct T0-alpha analog), mixture_gaussian (MDN K=3). Metrics: sample-based CRPS (ranking metric), Gaussian/mixture NLL, central-80%-interval coverage error, and precision_error_corr (per-point predictive-variance vs realized-error correlation = the downstream E3-commitment signal the running-variance EMA structurally cannot carry). Encoder is a frozen feature map (no joint training; heads train on detached z_world = effectively P1). LOAD-BEARING READINESS: point-arm normalised held-out residual >= 0.05 AND >= 200 test transitions, else self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory, non_degenerate=False) -- NEVER a false 'distributional heads don't help'. C1 (load-bearing): best distributional CRPS strict-below mse_point CRPS by >=2% on a strict-majority of seeds -> PASS (label distributional_head_ranking); readiness-met-but-C1-fail -> FAIL (distributional_heads_no_benefit_over_point, a real informative negative -- latent-space MSE is less pathological than obs-space). NOT MINTED as a reusable baseline: all cells share the frozen encoder + transition set across the head arms (extra_ineligible_reasons correctness guard), so every arm_fingerprint is reuse_eligible=False by construction. Smoke --dry-run self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (33 transitions < 200 floor, as designed); a 1-seed x40-episode verification hit the readiness-met branch -> PASS, winner quantile_pinball (CRPS 0.0048 vs point 0.0052; precision_error_corr 0.415 vs point/EMA null 0.0). A PASS here would motivate /implement-substrate of the winning head into E2 (SD-031 caveat: a variance head must not explain away the E2WorldForward agency residual). validate_experiments --strict --paths OK.
